positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a playful, leaping Bengal tiger surrounded by tropical jungle flora and geometric abstract patterns. The tiger should have a clean silhouette, conveying energy and freedom. Focus on strong outlines, graphic simplicity, and vibrant colors with a limited palette (teal, saffron, emerald green, and black). Use bold negative space and clean separation between elements. Composition should be central and dynamic, suitable for a wearable art print. Vector art aesthetic, screen printing style, flat design, highly detailed, crisp edges, --ar 1:1
